revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-190 

A part of a cell or battery to which an external circuit is connected.


Note: It is international practice to mark the positive terminal with a plus sign or the colour red.

{{IALAFooter}}
